final:
module top_module(
	input [3:0] A,
	input [3:0] B,
	input CLK,
	input RST,
	output reg [4:0] SUM
	);always@(posedge CLK) begin
		if (RST) begin
			SUM <= 5'b0;
		end
		else begin
			SUM <= {1'b0, A} + {1'b0, B};
		end
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      SUM <= 5'b1;
    end
  end

endmodule
